title: About the Editors
text: ABOUT THE EDITORS Daniel Pinchbeck is the editorial director of Reality Sandwich and cofounder of Evolver.net . A founder of the literary magazine Open City , he has also written for Esquire, The New York Times Magazine, The Village Voice , and Rolling Stone . He has coedited several anthologies with Ken Jordan, including Toward 2012: Perspectives on the Next Age and What Comes After Money? , and is the author of 2012: The Return of Quetzalcoatl and Breaking Open the Head , among other books. Ken Jordan is publisher and executive producer of Reality Sandwich and Evolver.net. He is coeditor of several anthologies, including Multimedia: From Wagner to Virtual Reality , and Toward 2012: Perspectives on the Next Age , and What Comes After Money? , and has written for Wired, Paris Review, Index, and First Monday , among other publications.
